mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, subscription_id, event_type, payload_json, http_status, response_body, delivery_status, attempt, next_retry_at, created_at
mapper.select: select from batch.webhook_delivery_log where delivery_status in ('PENDING', 'EXHAUSTED') and next_retry_at is not null and next_retry_at <= #{now} order by next_retry_at asc limit #{limit} for update skip locked
select from batch.webhook_delivery_log where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update batch.webhook_delivery_log set next_retry_at = null where id = #{id} and delivery_status in ('PENDING', 'EXHAUSTED') and next_retry_at is not null
update batch.webhook_delivery_log set delivery_status = 'SUCCESS', http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_body = null, attempt = #{attempt}, next_retry_at = null where id = #{id}

update batch.webhook_delivery_log set attempt = #{attempt}, http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_body = #{responseBody}, delivery_status = 'EXHAUSTED', next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt} where id = #{id}
update batch.webhook_delivery_log set delivery_status = 'GIVE_UP', attempt = #{attempt}, http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_body = #{responseBody}, next_retry_at = null where id = #{id}
